ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the usage metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing plan */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the plan is associated with */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default plan for the product */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of usage */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plan is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_plans_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_metrics" (
  "plan_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan metric */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing plan */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Allowed value for the usage metric */,
  "is_limit_soft" INTEGER /* Indicates if the limit is soft */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the plan metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the plan metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_metrics_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES usage_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the organization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the team belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "usage_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Actual value of the usage metric */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage log */,
  "is_over_limit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the usage was over the plan limit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES usage_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage metric */,
  "budget_value" REAL /* Budget value for the usage metric */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  "is_overridden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget has been overridden */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES usage_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
